creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sat Apr 26 02:38:00 2014
New Revision: 352218
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352218
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352218/

Log:
  - Support USE_GITHUP
  
  PR:		187760
  Submitted by:	Ports FUry

Modified:
  head/net/py-netaddr/Makefile

Modified: head/net/py-netaddr/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/py-netaddr/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 02:36:52 2014	(r352217)
+++ head/net/py-netaddr/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 02:38:00 2014	(r352218)
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 PORTNAME=	netaddr
 PORTVERSION=	0.7.10
 CATEGORIES=	net python
-MASTER_SITES=	https://github.com/downloads/drkjam/netaddr/
+MASTER_SITES=	GHC
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
@@ -12,6 +12,11 @@ COMMENT=	Python library for the manipula
 
 LICENSE=	BSD
 
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}
+
+USE_GITHUB=	yes
+GH_ACCOUNT=	drkjam
+
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
